raw.message: 放置系まったりRPG！ドラベル 正式リリース！

hook.summary: High-energy character reveal of a red-haired warrior.
hook.visual_action: Rapid zooms and transitions showcasing the character 'Siegfried' with bold text overlays and flashing backgrounds.

scene_flow: Rapid-fire close-up shots of the character Siegfried with bold name text.
Full-body character art reveal with SSR+ rarity and Warrior class labels.
Transition to the game title logo 'Dragon Travel' on a solid blue background.
Animated dragon mascot appears over the logo with fire effects and a slime character.
audience_proxy: Male anime enthusiasts and gacha RPG players looking for high-rarity character reveals.
